notes: v237 — Big speed fix for slow loads: a full market list contains hundreds of delisted/suspended symbols that fail every data route, and each one was re-tried through every proxy timeout on EVERY load — those stalls were most of the waiting. Now a symbol that fails every route is skipped for the rest of the day (retried fresh tomorrow; any successful fetch or a forced re-download clears it instantly). The loading line also shows a live time-remaining estimate and reminds you the app stays usable while it finishes — progress is saved as it goes. Includes v236's live/offline mode fixes.
